name: Quail Meadows Golf Course
about: Quail Meadows Golf Course is a full-year golf facility located in Washington, Illinois, featuring an 18-hole, par 72 championship course suitable for players of all abilities. The venue includes a driving range and an indoor golf center equipped with Full Swing Pro 2.0 simulators that offer 50 virtual courses and driving range capabilities. It provides a range of amenities including a pro shop, banquet facilities, leagues, and a players card program for discounts. The facility is designed to cater to both outdoor and indoor play, making it versatile for different seasons and preferences.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing Pro 2.0 simulators with 50 course options
Discount Player's Card for reduced rates
Banquet facility for large events and private parties
Located near Illinois Central College Campus

food_and_drink.notes: Available for events and banquets; specific details not provided
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulators with 50 courses and driving range capabilities

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, though rentals may be available; contact the venue for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food and drink policies are not explicitly stated; for banquets and events, catering is provided, but outside food rules are unclear.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes is not specified; typical outdoor play ranges from 4-5 hours, depending on pace and course conditions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Quail Meadows offers a family-friendly environment with junior programs and events suitable for children.
